⚠️ Important Update: We withdrew from ToshiMart due to phishing concerns. Only use the official INPI token: 0x232FB12582ac10d5fAd97e9ECa22670e8Ba67d0D. All official contracts are listed on our homepage.

🔥 PRESALE LIVE NOW: 2,000,000 INPI per 1 ETH until March 25, 2026. 👉 Join the Presale

📖 Immortal Guestbook DEMO

Guestbook is currently in development. This page is a demo preview: entries are stored locally in your browser (localStorage) and the “NFT mint” is a simulation.
Coming soon: real on-chain guestbook entries and NFT minting on Base.

⚡ Base L2
🦄 Uniswap
INPI: 0

Sign the Guestbook (Demo)

Demo Notice: In production, signing will require a small fee (e.g. 1 INPI) and minting will create a real NFT. For now, this is a safe preview with no real transfers.

✨ Mint Your Entry as an NFT (Demo)

This is a demo. In production, minting will create a real NFT on Base that contains your message as metadata.
